close_reason: Removed WorkerPool wrapper (~60 lines), Manager now uses DynamicSupervisor directly
description:
WorkerPool (~60 lines) is a thin wrapper around DynamicSupervisor:
- dispatch(): just calls DynamicSupervisor.start_child
- available_workers(): persistent_term hack + count query

Fix: Eliminate WorkerPool, have Manager call DynamicSupervisor directly. Store max_children in Manager state.
title: Remove WorkerPool wrapper
